properties.areaDesc: Suffolk MA; Norfolk MA; Plymouth MA; Bristol MA; Barnstable MA; Dukes MA; Nantucket MA
properties.headline: Hurricane Warning issued June 26 at 11:04AM EDT until June 27 at 11:00PM EDT by NWS Boston/Norton MA
properties.description:
* WHAT...Hurricane conditions expected. Sustained winds 65 to 75 mph with gusts to 90 mph, heaviest Saturday afternoon into Saturday night.

* WHERE...Coastal eastern Massachusetts, including Boston, the South Shore, Cape Cod, and the Islands.

* WHEN...Saturday morning through early Sunday as Hurricane Arthur passes east of the coast.

* IMPACTS...Downed trees and power lines, widespread power outages lasting days, and dangerous coastal conditions.
properties.instruction: Preparations to protect life and property should be rushed to completion. Stay off the roads during the height of the storm. Follow guidance from local emergency officials.

NWSheadline: HURRICANE WARNING IN EFFECT FROM SATURDAY MORNING THROUGH EARLY SUNDAY

properties.areaDesc: Suffolk MA; Essex MA; Plymouth MA; Barnstable MA
properties.headline: Coastal Flood Warning issued June 26 at 11:12AM EDT until June 28 at 4:00AM EDT by NWS Boston/Norton MA
properties.description:
* WHAT...Two to four feet of inundation above ground level expected in vulnerable shoreline areas around the times of high tide.

* WHERE...East-facing coastline from Cape Ann to Cape Cod, including Boston Harbor.

* WHEN...Saturday morning high tide through the Sunday early-morning high tide.

* IMPACTS...Flooding of shoreline roads, parking lots, and low-lying properties; some road closures likely.
properties.instruction: Never drive through flooded roadways. Move vehicles and belongings out of flood-prone shoreline areas before Saturday morning's high tide.

NWSheadline: COASTAL FLOOD WARNING IN EFFECT THROUGH THE WEEKEND HIGH TIDES

properties.areaDesc: Worcester MA; Middlesex MA; Norfolk MA; Providence RI
properties.headline: High Wind Warning issued June 26 at 11:20AM EDT from Saturday noon until Sunday 2:00AM EDT by NWS Boston/Norton MA
properties.description:
* WHAT...Northeast winds 30 to 40 mph with gusts up to 65 mph expected inland of the hurricane-warned coast.

* WHERE...Interior eastern Massachusetts and northern Rhode Island.

* WHEN...From noon Saturday until 2 AM Sunday.

* IMPACTS...Tree damage and scattered to widespread power outages; travel will be difficult, especially for high-profile vehicles.
properties.instruction: Secure loose outdoor objects before Saturday morning. Remain in the lower levels of your home during the windstorm and avoid windows.

NWSheadline: HIGH WIND WARNING IN EFFECT FROM NOON SATURDAY TO 2 AM EDT SUNDAY
